title: Ioustos #2459
definition:
Justus = "just"

 1) a surname of Joseph, called Barsabas. \\#Ac 1:23\\
 2) of Titus, a Christian at Corinth, with whom Paul lodged. \\#Ac 18:7\\
 3) a surname of Jesus, a friend of Paul. \\#Col 4:11\\
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  Justus, the name of three Chr.:
